Implemented the new ARC2 package for `770cc55f` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_770cc55f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_770cc55f/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_770cc55f/generator.py). The rule is: find the column overlap between the top and bottom colored segments, then fill that overlap with `4` on the side of the middle `2` divider that touches the longer segment. The summary hint was used, because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

The generator stays close to the task family: odd-height empty grids, a centered full-width divider, one contiguous top segment, one contiguous bottom segment in the same color, unequal segment lengths, and guaranteed positive overlap. Verification passed on all official examples (`5/5`) and all generated examples (`1000/1000`), and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/770cc55f/previews/preview_01.png).
